_meta.description: Knowledge base index. Agents read THIS to find the right reference file for their task. DO NOT scan the knowledge folder — use this index.
_meta.usage: 1. Check which category matches your task. 2. Read ONLY that file. 3. Copy code patterns directly — don't reinvent.

categories.frameworks: When to use which framework, install commands, project structure
categories.libraries: How to use specific libraries (shadcn, framer-motion, tailwind, etc.)
categories.patterns: Code patterns with sample code for common tasks
categories.components-source: Pre-built component code ready to copy into projects

frameworks.framework-selection.md: Decision matrix: which framework for which project type and scope
frameworks.nextjs.md: Next.js App Router patterns, file conventions, API routes, layouts
frameworks.vite-react.md: Vite + React setup, routing, build config
frameworks.expo-react-native.md: Expo + React Native setup, navigation, native APIs
frameworks.html-css-js.md: Vanilla HTML/CSS/JS patterns for Simple scope projects

libraries.shadcn-ui.md: shadcn/ui install, component list, usage examples, theming
libraries.tailwind.md: Tailwind CSS utility patterns, responsive, dark mode, custom config
libraries.framer-motion.md: Animation patterns: fade, slide, scale, stagger, scroll, layout
libraries.react-hook-form.md: Form handling with validation, error display, submission
libraries.zustand.md: State management: stores, selectors, persist, devtools
libraries.prisma.md: Database ORM: schema, migrations, CRUD queries, relations
libraries.nextauth.md: Authentication: providers, session, middleware, protected routes
libraries.stripe.md: Payments: checkout, subscriptions, webhooks, customer portal
libraries.zod.md: Input validation: schemas, parsing, error messages, form integration

patterns.react-components.md: Component patterns: props, composition, conditional render, lists
patterns.api-patterns.md: API route patterns: CRUD, auth middleware, error handling, validation
patterns.data-fetching.md: Data fetching: server components, client fetch, SWR/React Query, loading states
patterns.auth-flow.md: Authentication flow: login, signup, session, protected routes, middleware
patterns.responsive-layout.md: Responsive patterns: mobile-first, breakpoints, grid, flex, container queries
patterns.dark-mode.md: Dark mode: Tailwind class strategy, system preference, toggle, persistence
patterns.seo.md: SEO patterns: metadata, sitemap, robots, Open Graph, structured data

components-source.button.md: Button component with variants, sizes, loading state — copy-paste ready
components-source.input.md: Input component with label, error, icon — copy-paste ready
components-source.card.md: Card component with image, content, actions — copy-paste ready
components-source.modal.md: Modal/dialog with backdrop, focus trap, animations — copy-paste ready
components-source.data-table.md: Data table with sort, filter, pagination — copy-paste ready
components-source.navbar.md: Responsive navbar with mobile menu — copy-paste ready
components-source.sidebar.md: Collapsible sidebar for dashboards — copy-paste ready
components-source.form.md: Complete form with validation — copy-paste ready
